title: A crowd observed 5 round white UFOs near an airstrip of Canoas Airport – RS [1997]
excerpt: MARCH 11th, 1997. Time: 20h30. text_preview: MARCH 11th, 1997. Time: 20h30. In the city of Canoas, State of Rio Grande do Sul, “near the head of one of the SBCO runways” [Canoas-RS Airport], several people observed five UFOs grouped together, with circular shapes and different sizes. The five unknown objects were white in color, and also varied in speed while performing circular movements. According to the witnesses, the sighting took place under unstable weather conditions; cloudy sky. Photographs of the sighting were taken, but they were not shared in this file. It was also reported that “contact was made with the TWR CO [Control Tower
summary: A crowd near Canoas Airport runway observed five white circular UFOs of varying sizes performing circular movements on March 11, 1997; photographs were taken but not shared.
